name: Zeus Digital · FT8/FT4
author: Douglas J. Cerrato (KB2UKA)
description: Native FT8/FT4 digital-mode engine extracted from Zeus core: multi-pass decode (kgoba/ft8_lib), TX encode + auto-sequencing, PSK Reporter spotting, and WSJT-X-compatible UDP live decode egress. Drives the built-in Zeus Digital pop-out — installing this plugin lights up the FT8/FT4 mode buttons. WSPR decode/TX is staged in the engine but not yet enabled in the UI. Never auto-keys: the operator arms TX manually, every session.
